yaml:
workflow:
  id: auth-common
  name: Auth — common (library)
  description: |
    Reusable OAuth + permission-check sub-Vibe. Imported by the other examples.
  version: "1.0.0"
  variables:
    - name: scopes
      type: array
      description: OAuth scopes the parent Vibe requires.

  steps:
    - id: check_session
      function: apiRequest
      input:
        endpoint: /auth/session
      output: session
      on_error_step_id: refresh

    - id: scope_check
      kind: if
      condition: $session.scopes
      then:
        - id: ok
          function: setVariable
          input:
            authed: true
          output: auth
      else:
        - id: request_consent
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: /auth/consent
            method: POST
            body:
              scopes: $scopes
          output: auth

    - id: refresh
      function: apiRequest
      description: Try a silent refresh before bouncing the user to consent.
      input:
        endpoint: /auth/refresh
        method: POST
      output: session
      next_step_id: scope_check
